chunks.text: GravityWrite is now on sale for just 97 dollars for entire year.
Here's what you get on GravityWrite.
A blog writer that can write SEO friendly blogs with original images automatically included.
And the best part?
Publish the blog on your website in one click.
Next, you can generate both images and videos for social media,
where there is no need to write detailed prompts because the templates are already included.
So just pick the template you need and hit generate.
All content stays on brand because Gravity Right can automatically detect your brand colors and use them in the images that you generate.
Next, once you create your content, you can connect all your social media accounts into Gravity Right and then instantly schedule them across all of your accounts.

Gravity Right also comes with an AI website builder, which means just by giving a description about your business in few lines, you will be able to generate the entire business website, including original images.
images. Next up, if you have long meetings with your team and want a quick summary,
just drop the audio or video into Gravity Right and you get an instant
summary in minutes. If you have an e-commerce site, Gravity Right can create UGC ads,
lately my hair's been super weak so I tried Tungi Essentials Keshibala oil, 360 degree spins,
virtual product try on videos and much more. You can even create VFX level content from an image.
Next we have AI Voice Generator.
Simply enter the text you want and the AI Voice will be generated instantly.
Every day, Maya worked on her idea after finishing her job.
Want an AI avatar? Just choose an avatar, enter your text, and hit Generate Video.
And Gravity Right will generate the AI avatar video with perfect lip-sync.

Have you ever wondered what the world is searching for?
What people are curious about?
How trends emerge and change over time?
In a world flooded with information,
understanding what people truly care about can be a challenge.
Google Trends is the perfect tool to help you understand the world better.
And where to start, tune in to the new Google Trends tutorial series for
deep dive into the trendiest trends on the web.
Learn how to explore the universe of online searches,
revealing fascinating insights into current events, cultural trends, and consumer behavior.
Google Trends tutorials is not about right data.
I'm Daniel Weisberg, and in this series, together with Omri Weismann,
and Hadas Jokobi. I will show how you can transform your business, improve your content,
and shape your online strategy with Google Trends. Subscribe to the Google Search
Center YouTube channel to get notified about new videos and let's unlock the secrets
of Google Trends together. Stay tuned.

Have you ever wondered what the world is searching for?
What people are curious about?
How trends emerge and change over time?
In a world flooded with information,
understanding what people truly care about can be a challenge.
Google Trends is the perfect tool to help you understand the world better.
And where to start, tune in to the new Google Trends tutorial series for
deep dive into the trendiest trends on the web.
Learn how to explore the universe of online searches,
revealing fascinating insights into current events, cultural trends, and consumer behavior.
Google Trends tutorials is not about right data.
I'm Daniel Weisberg, and in this series, together with Omri Weismann,
and Hadas Jokobi. I will show how you can transform your business, improve your content,
and shape your online strategy with Google Trends. Subscribe to the Google Search
Center YouTube channel to get notified about new videos and let's unlock the secrets
of Google Trends together. Stay tuned.
